posts.text:
I’d assume Mamdani’s wife illustrates for them as well?

Video
What should we ask @JohnFetterman tonight on @BigWeekendShow ?

Democrats allow millions of illegal invaders into your country, many of whom are dangerous, some of whom are terrorists.

And now they have defunded DHS in their DEMAND we have less immigration enforcement, apprehension and deportation. 

They opened the door for us to be slaughtered, now they wanna make sure it stays open and are fine with TSA workers and others going without pay just to hammer home that message. 

If you’re still voting for Democrats, you might wanna pull your head out of your
Do you all really think Zoron the Moron is destroying New York by accident? Do you really think this isn’t by design? Come on now.

To those weak-stomached Americans who got squirmish on “mass deportations” because the white leftist banshees got in your head, remember this, the Democrats don’t consider ANY illegal to be “worst of the worst.”

We’ve got naturalized immigrants + illegals in this country who are KNOWN terrorists and the leftist activist judges are like, nah give em another chance. 

This should piss you the hell off. 

Not only do we need MASS deportations, we need MASS de-naturalizations. 

Get them OUT.

Justifying acts of terrorism is truly disgusting. We don’t care if the suspect was having a bad day. We don’t care if he’s had a bad life. Quite frankly, we don’t give one f*ck about him. We care that he tried to murder Americans. Period. End of discussion. No explanation needed. Convo ends here.


ABC News (@ABC)

SYNAGOGUE ATTACK LATEST: The mayor of Dearborn Heights said that the suspect involved in the shooting and vehicle-ramming attack at a Detroit-area synagogue had “lost several members

Terrorists they imported keep shouting Allahu Akbar and the Left still lectures us on Islamophobia and blames white supremacy. 

It’s clear: democrats want these people here, they want them here forever, they want them on the streets, they want to import infinity more. 

They also want them voting. 

And they aren’t quiet about it either. They are happy to admit it and yet, some of you keep voting for them because you hate Trump. 

Liberalism is a disease.
